Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, max(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__max" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/ccc2ef6faecdbc771d28ebadaee4070ac99bba493f0d801debb9156dc3be5bf8/daa8eed8-1e6a-4906-9bdd-ea0aecd0792b/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
